courseName: OpenClaw 实验报告技能仓库
requiredKeywords: OpenClaw 实验报告技能仓库

paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-long-section: Split the monthly rollup into week-by-week, milestone-by-milestone, or deliverable-based subsections before building, or raise paginationRiskThresholds.longSectionChars if long monthly summaries are expected.
paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-dense-section-block: Break dense monthly status text into separate paragraphs for objective, action, evidence, and impact, or tune denseSectionChars and denseSectionParagraphs if compact executive summaries are expected.
paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-figure-cluster: Move some screenshots into '阶段成果与数据' or spread them across adjacent sections, or raise paginationRiskThresholds.figureClusterRefs if the monthly report normally groups many evidence screenshots together.
